title: `podman build --layers` segfaults when remote registry is down
body:
/kind bug

**Description**

`podman-0.8.3-4.dev.git3d55721.fc30.x86_64` 

When trying to build with `podman build --layers` with a Dockerfile that references an image from a  **down registry** I get a nil pointer dereference panic. This happened yesterday during planned maintenance for the fedora registry, so the registry was down and I was trying to build an image with `registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:28`.

```
[root@vanilla-rawhide-atomic foo]# sudo podman build --layers .
STEP 1: FROM registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:28
STEP 2: CMD /bin/bash
panic: runtime error: invalid memory address or nil pointer dereference
[signal SIGSEGV: segmentation violation code=0x1 addr=0xd8 pc=0x56003c9b49b5]
```

Expland details section below for full trace
<details>

Testing this out without `--layers` seemed to work fine:

```
[root@vanilla-rawhide-atomic foo]# sudo podman build .                                                                                                
                                                                                                                                                      
STEP 1: FROM registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:28                                                                                                      
STEP 2: CMD /bin/bash     
error creating build container: image "registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:28" not found in /etc/containers/registries.conf registries: image not known
```

And pulling from the registry showed an appropriate error message.

```
[root@vanilla-rawhide-atomic ~]# sudo podman pull registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:28                                                                
Trying to pull registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:28...Failed
error pulling image "registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:28": unable to pull registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:28: unable to pull image, or you do not ha
ve pull access 
```

running via docker cli seemed to give an appropriate error message:

```
[vagrant@vanilla-rawhide-atomic weechat]$ bash build.sh 
+ sudo docker build -t weechat ./
Sending build context to Docker daemon 54.27 kB
Step 1/14 : FROM registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:28
Trying to pull repository registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora ... 
Pulling repository registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora
Error: image fedora:28 not found
```

comments.body: @umohnani8 Don't we already have a fix for this?
@rhatdan @TomSweeneyRedHat could one of you please close this. Could I also get privileges to this repo so I can close issues in future.
@umohnani8 You now can close them yourself.
